description: Samples nodal responses. These include displacement, velocity, position, and out-of-balance force.

6.0.description: Samples nodal responses. These include displacement, velocity, position, and out-of-balance force.

keywords.name: displacement-x
keywords.description: translational displacement (x-component, global or node-local system)

keywords.name: displacement-y
keywords.description: translational displacement (y-component, global or node-local system)

keywords.name: displacement-z
keywords.description: translational displacement (z-component, global or node-local system)

keywords.name: displacement-rotational-x
keywords.description: rotational displacement (x-component, global or node-local system)

keywords.name: displacement-rotational-y
keywords.description: rotational displacement (y-component, global or node-local system)

keywords.name: displacement-rotational-z
keywords.description: rotational displacement (z-component, global or node-local system)

keywords.name: force-x
keywords.description: translational out-of-balance force (x-component, global or node-local system)

keywords.name: force-y
keywords.description: translational out-of-balance force (y-component, global or node-local system)

keywords.name: force-z
keywords.description: translational out-of-balance force (z-component, global or node-local system)

keywords.name: moment-x
keywords.description: out-of-balance moment (x-component, global or node-local system)

keywords.name: moment-y
keywords.description: out-of-balance moment (y-component, global or node-local system)

keywords.name: moment-z
keywords.description: out-of-balance moment (z-component, global or node-local system)

keywords.name: position-x
keywords.description: current position (x-component, global system)

keywords.name: position-y
keywords.description: current position (y-component, global system)

keywords.name: position-z
keywords.description: current position (z-component, global system)

keywords.name: velocity-x
keywords.description: translational velocity (x-component, global or node-local system)

keywords.name: velocity-y
keywords.description: translational velocity (y-component, global or node-local system)

keywords.name: velocity-z
keywords.description: translational velocity (z-component, global or node-local system)

keywords.name: velocity-rotational-x
keywords.description: rotational velocity (x-component, global or node-local system)

keywords.name: velocity-rotational-y
keywords.description: rotational velocity (y-component, global or node-local system)

keywords.name: velocity-rotational-z
keywords.description: rotational velocity (z-component, global or node-local system)

keywords.name: component-id
keywords.description: the particular node is identified by the component ID number. If this keyword is used, position should not be used.

keywords.name: local
keywords.description: specifies that the value will be taken in the local node coordinate system. By default, the value will be taken in the global coordinate system.

keywords.name: position
keywords.description: the particular node is identified by (v) coordinates (the nearest node is taken). If this keyword is used, component-id should not be used.
